properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've been there a thousand times Felt the rain like a thousand knives And it hurts, I know it hurts

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've been there like a fighter plane Trying to fly my way through a hurricane And it's hard, I know it's hard

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Don't be afraid, you'll make it through Just call out to me and I'll come running to you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And hold on, hold on When the current pulls you under And your heart beats like thunder Just give me your hand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And hold on, hold on Until the storm is over And I'll be fighting for you Just give me your hand and hold on

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I give you hope, I give you faith And if it's dark I light the way For you, for you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: By your side until the end Until you're standing tall again I'm here, I'll always be here

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And if the tide sweeps you out to sea When your strength is gone and it's hard to believe

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Hold on, hold on When the current pulls you under And your heart beats like thunder Just give me your hand

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: And hold on, hold on Until the storm is over And I'll be fighting for you Just give me your hand Hold on

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: So hold on, hold on When the current pulls you under And your heart beats like thunder Just give me your hand
